title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at OLX India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at OLX India
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Software Engineer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!
